title: Chinatown Charlie
writer: Roland Asher, Owen Davis, John Grey
actors: Johnny Hines, Louise Lorraine, Harry Gribbon
plot: Chinatown bus tour guide Charlie (Hines) finds that one of his lady riders (Louise Lorraine) is pursued by a Tong gang because she has a supposedly magic ring. They kidnap her and she's brought to a mysterious Mandarin's mansion, ...
